name: Tall Man Runner Game
description: Welcome to the Tall Man Runner Game: 3D Running Games. Run as tall, Run as wide, thick and get to the right gates to become the tallest man in Tall Man Runner Game: 3D Running Games. Note that a light touch on the hurdles will break the running man. Tall Man Runner Game: 3D Running Games is an epic running game. Come and feel the fun! Your task is to make your man taller, and thicker in this Tall Runner 3D! Short Man Run to get a reward and Bonus at the end of this game and avoid obstacles to win.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
